info.name: Property Management SaaS
info.description: Postman collection for Property Management SaaS backend (auth, users, admins, organizations, subscriptions, plan-configs, buildings, floors, units, tenants, leases, invoices, payments, expenses, complaints, documents, rent-agreements, rent-increases, dashboard, reports, notifications, activity-logs). Base URL is set via the `baseUrl` collection variable. After /login the access token is captured to `{{accessToken}}` automatically.

exec: } catch (e) { console.log('No JSON body to parse'); }
} catch (e) { console.log('No JSON body to parse'); }

request.description:
Login with email address.

The 'identifier' field accepts either an email or a phone number — server auto-detects based on '@' character.

Returns 401 'Invalid credentials' for unknown identifier (no user enumeration).

Auto-captures accessToken, refreshToken, sessionToken, userId, organizationId on success.

exec: } catch (e) { console.log('No JSON body to parse'); }

request.description:
Login with phone number.

Server looks up User.contactNumber to find the account, then signs in with the same password.

Requirements:
• User.contactNumber must be set (during registration or staff creation).
• Same password as email login — no separate phone password.

Returns 401 'Invalid credentials' if phone not found in the system.
Refresh token is read from the `refreshToken` cookie set during login.

Generates a fresh email-verification OTP and sends it via email.

Use when:
• Previous OTP expired (default 2 minutes)
• User didn't receive the original email

Errors:
• 404 — user not found
• 400 — email already verified

Generates a fresh password-reset OTP. Email must already be verified.

Use when password-reset OTP expired during the reset flow.
Open this URL in a browser to initiate Google OAuth — won't complete inside Postman.
Allowed: OWNER, SUPER_ADMIN. `role` must be MANAGER or CARETAKER.
Allowed: OWNER, MANAGER, CARETAKER. If `createLoginAccount` is true, `password` is required.
Allowed: ADMIN, SUPER_ADMIN. Returns all platform admin accounts.
Allowed: ADMIN, SUPER_ADMIN.
Allowed: SUPER_ADMIN only. All fields under `admin` are optional.
Allowed: SUPER_ADMIN only.
Allowed: OWNER, MANAGER, CARETAKER. Returns the caller's organization with its subscription.
Allowed: OWNER only. All fields optional.
Public endpoint — returns all available subscription plans with limits and pricing.
Allowed: OWNER, MANAGER. Returns active subscription for caller's organization (plan, status, limits, trial end date).
Allowed: OWNER only. Plan must be one of FREE, BASIC, STANDARD, BUSINESS.
Allowed: OWNER only. Cancels the active subscription for the caller's organization.
Allowed: OWNER only. Reactivates a previously cancelled subscription.
Allowed: SUPER_ADMIN only. Returns all organization subscriptions.
Allowed: SUPER_ADMIN only. Manually override a subscription for any organization.
Allowed: SUPER_ADMIN only. Returns all plan configurations (limits, pricing, features). Captures first id to {{planConfigId}}.
Allowed: SUPER_ADMIN only. `plan` path param must be one of FREE, BASIC, STANDARD, BUSINESS.
Allowed: SUPER_ADMIN only.

body.raw:
{
  "plan": "STANDARD",
  "displayName": "Standard",
  "description": "For growing property managers",
  "buildingLimit": 10,
  "floorLimit": 50,
  "unitLimit": 200,
  "tenantLimit": 200,
  "smsEnabled": true,
  "customBranding": false,
  "multiAdmin": true,
  "priceMonthly": 2500,
  "trialDays": 14,
  "isPopular": true,
  "features": ["Up to 200 units", "SMS reminders", "Multiple admins"],
  "isActive": true
}

request.description: Allowed: SUPER_ADMIN only. `plan` must be one of FREE, BASIC, STANDARD, BUSINESS. Limits, priceMonthly required; smsEnabled/customBranding/multiAdmin/trialDays/isPopular/isActive optional. Captures created id to {{planConfigId}}.
Allowed: SUPER_ADMIN only. All fields optional. `plan` cannot be changed.
Allowed: SUPER_ADMIN only.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Lalmatia Block A",
  "type": "RESIDENTIAL",
  "address": "House 12, Road 5, Lalmatia, Dhaka",
  "city": "Dhaka",
  "area": "Lalmatia",
  "totalFloors": 5,
  "description": "5-storey residential building"
}

request.description: Allowed: OWNER. Subscription building limit is enforced.
Pass null in caretakerId to unassign.

Allowed: OWNER, MANAGER. Subscription unit limit is enforced.

All room counts (bedrooms, bathrooms, drawingRooms, diningRooms, kitchens, balconies) are optional and 0-20. Set to null/skip for non-residential units.

serviceCharge is optional — if not provided, unit has no fixed service charge.
Shop/garage/warehouse units don't need bedroom counts. Skip room fields entirely.
Minimal hostel/mess room — usually shared bathroom only.
All fields optional. Any combination can be updated.
Set createLoginAccount=true and provide password if tenant needs portal login. Subscription tenant limit is enforced.

Type 1: Bhara 30k all-included (gas, water, electricity bundled in monthlyRent).

billingMode defaults to INCLUSIVE — utility fields not needed.

Creates lease, marks unit OCCUPIED, auto-generates first month invoice with 1 line item ("Monthly Rent").

Type 2: Bhara 24k + utilities billed separately. Total = 24000 + 1500 + 2000 + 1500 + 2500 + 1000 = 32500.

FIXED_SEPARATE requires at least one utility charge.

First invoice will have line items: Rent, Service Charge, Gas, Water, Electricity, Internet.
Marks lease TERMINATED and unit VACANT.

Generates invoice using the lease's billingMode + fixed utility charges. No body fields needed beyond leaseId & billingMonth.

For INCLUSIVE leases: just rent.
For FIXED_SEPARATE leases: rent + service charge + all configured utilities.

Override specific utilities for this invoice only (e.g., electricity higher in summer). Other utilities still use lease defaults.

Only works for FIXED_SEPARATE leases. Override fields are optional individually.

Single bundled utility amount (when you don't want to break down). Useful for INCLUSIVE leases with one-off variable bills.

Added as one OTHER line item: "Utilities".
Generates invoices for all ACTIVE leases for the given month. Skips leases that already have an invoice that month.

Allowed: OWNER, MANAGER.

• 'notes' is always editable.
• Financial fields (dueDate, penaltyAmount, utilityAmount, utilities) editable only if NO payments are recorded yet.
• Cannot edit a CANCELLED invoice.
• Cannot pass both 'utilities' and 'utilityAmount'.

Total amount auto-recalculated from line items.
Override utility breakdown. Only works for FIXED_SEPARATE leases. Replaces existing utility line items.

Allowed: OWNER, MANAGER.

Soft cancel — preserves the invoice for audit. Sets status to CANCELLED, dueAmount to 0.

Restrictions:
• Cannot cancel an already-cancelled invoice.
• Cannot cancel a PAID invoice (issue refund instead).
• Cannot cancel if any payments exist (refund payments first).

Reason is required (min 5 chars).

Allowed: SUPER_ADMIN only. Permanent deletion (no recovery).

Use for cleaning up test data or truly erroneous entries.

Restrictions:
• Invoice must have NO payments.
• Invoice status must be DUE or CANCELLED.

For regular cancellation use POST /invoices/:id/cancel instead.
Records payment against invoice. Updates invoice status (PARTIAL/PAID) automatically.
Allowed: OWNER, MANAGER. Optionally link to a building or unit.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Water leakage in bathroom",
  "description": "The ceiling is leaking whenever it rains. Started 3 days ago.",
  "category": "PLUMBING",
  "priority": "HIGH",
  "buildingId": "{{buildingId}}",
  "unitId": "{{unitId}}"
}

request.description: Allowed: OWNER, MANAGER, CARETAKER, TENANT.
Allowed: OWNER, MANAGER. Assigns complaint to a staff member and sets status to ASSIGNED.
Multipart/form-data upload. File goes to Cloudinary. `type` is optional (NID, PASSPORT, AGREEMENT_PDF, TRADE_LICENSE, PHOTO, RECEIPT, OTHER).
Creates a DRAFT agreement for the lease. One agreement per lease.
Sign as 'owner' or 'tenant'. Status becomes SIGNED once both have signed.
Allowed: OWNER, MANAGER. Records increase and updates lease monthlyRent. New rent must be greater than current.
Returns full rent increase history for the lease, newest first.
Allowed: OWNER, MANAGER. Returns buildings, units (occupied/vacant), tenants, leases, monthly revenue, due/overdue invoices, open complaints.
Returns per-building occupancy rate and unit breakdown.
Monthly income vs expense breakdown. Defaults to current year.
Per-tenant billed, paid, and due breakdown.
Building-wise occupancy breakdown with per-unit status.
Expense breakdown by category with percentages.
Returns notifications for the logged-in user. Default limit: 50.
Allowed: OWNER, MANAGER. Audit trail of all logged actions.
